autocas_dataset_info.description: 20 medium-spin (2S=2, triplet) TM complexes — 5 CSD experimental + 15 model; AutoCAS-ready

field_guide.is_csd_geometry: True = CSD experimental geometry; False = idealized model geometry
field_guide.spin_2S: 2S quantum number (0=singlet LS, 1=doublet LS, 2=triplet MS, 3=quartet HS …)
field_guide.coordination_number: Number of bonds to metal center
field_guide.M_L_bond_distance_A: Metal-ligand bond distance in Ångströms (model geometries)
field_guide.bond_length_scale_factor: Scaling factor applied to equilibrium bond length (model geom)
field_guide.n_active_orbitals: o in CAS(e,o) — active space orbital count
field_guide.n_active_electrons: e in CAS(e,o) — active space electron count
field_guide.natural_orbital_occupations: CASSCF natural orbital occupations (CSD systems; seed for AutoCAS)
field_guide.correlation_energy_Eh: Dynamic correlation energy = E_CASSCF - E_HF (CSD systems)
field_guide.spin_contamination: ⟨S²⟩ - S(S+1) deviation from pure spin state (CSD systems)
field_guide.z_eff: Effective nuclear charge of metal (CSD systems)
field_guide.zeta_so_cm1: Spin-orbit coupling constant in cm⁻¹ (CSD systems)
field_guide.prec_entropy: Precision entropy from orbital entanglement analysis (v2 systems)
field_guide.perf_entropy: Whether entropy criterion is satisfied (v2 systems)
field_guide.orbitals: Per-orbital ML feature vectors (v2 systems; empty list for CSD)
field_guide.autocas_run_hint: Ready-to-use AutoCAS run string with CAS dimensions and DMRG settings
